qt: BATNA:
op: Gives the disputant a clear picture of how much ability one has to get ones underlying interests and needs met
Is unable to protect disputant and his or her team from making irrational choices
Forbids team to accept a deal better than the BATNA

Using them often leads to poor outcomes

Cultural differences in self-concept and identity
